name: ai-architecture-viewer
description: A local-first visual architecture handoff and review workbench for coding agents and humans.

scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:instance
scripts.test:contracts: node --test test/contracts.test.cjs test/server.test.cjs test/analysis-contract.test.cjs test/analysis-server.test.cjs test/ai-coding-exchange.test.cjs test/mcp-server.test.cjs test/pending-changes.test.cjs test/development-contract-preview.test.mjs test/review-records.test.mjs
